_meta.description: Gospel symbols used to illustrate abstract doctrines. Each symbol has a label and an inline SVG. The SVGs use currentColor so they inherit the app's ink color. Replace the 'svg' field or swap in an 'imageUrl' (from the Church's Gospel Language Symbols library) without changing any code.
_meta.source: Inspired by the Gospel Language Symbols library (https://www.churchofjesuschrist.org/study/manual/gospel-symbols?lang=eng). SVGs authored for this app for reliable offline rendering.

schema.label: short human label
schema.imageUrl: optional override — if present, app displays the image instead of the SVG

jesus-christ.label: Jesus Christ
jesus-christ.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 100 100' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><circle cx='50' cy='50' r='36' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2.5'/><path d='M50 22 V78 M28 50 H72' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='3.5' stroke-linecap='round'/></svg>
